title: DinoCore
description: A library mod to organize and run my collection of realistic high-end minecraft dinosaur mods
body:
The DinoCore mod DOES NOT add any features / dinosaurs by itself. 
It is simply an organization mod required by all my dinosaur mods to function correctly.
The Dinocore mod creates a new unique mob cap system completely seperate from normal mobs handling natural spawning mechanics for my (coming up) dinosaur mods.

Geckolib 5.4.2 is required for this mod and the mods that depend on it. 



# PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS PROJECT AND THE ARCHITECTURE SURROUNDING IT IS ARCHIVED!!!
## EXPECT A THEME RELATED RELEASE IN SUMMER 26
